items.title: Keep .md extension in displayed file names
items.body: Do not trim the .md suffix when rendering file names in the UI.

items.title: Home page: remove first section and add search to second
items.body: Remove the first section on the home page and add search functionality to the second section.

items.title: Render files as a tree using shadcn tree control
items.body: Show files in a tree view using a built-in shadcn component/control.

items.title: Settings: configurable context/comment prefixes for copy
items.body: Add settings options to change the prefix used for context and comment when copy is clicked.

items.title: Prepend file path when copying content
items.body: When copy runs, prepend the file path at the beginning to improve context for AI agents.

items.title: Investigate how file comments/data are persisted
items.body: Document and verify where and how comment/data are persisted per file.

items.title: Settings: configurable comments delimiter
items.body: Add a settings option to configure the delimiter used between comments when copying multiple comments.

items.title: Settings: file path mode for copy (relative/full)
items.body: Add an option to include file path as relative or full path in copied output.
